w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Automated Research Article to JATS XML Conversion Platform for Scholarly Database Indexing

The objective of this project is to develop a web-based platform that automatically converts scholarly research articles into industry-standard JATS XML formats required by major indexing and archiving databases.

The platform will streamline publication workflows by extracting metadata from research articles, generating XML files compliant with international standards, validating generated XML, and preparing article packages for submission to scholarly repositories.
The generated XML should support compliance with:
Also Convert XML into HTML Version of the Article.
Convert DOCX research articles into JATS XML.
Mandatory field checks before XML generation.
Standard JATS XML compliant with NISO JATS standards.
What you suggest is best and cheapest option for storage?
NOTE: It should be 100% Automatic conversion from Word to JAT XML File.
XML generation under 30 seconds per article
The project shall be considered successful when:
Articles are automatically converted to valid JATS XML.
Articles are automatically converted to valid
Editorial workflow reduces XML preparation effort by at least 70%.
Generated XML packages are accepted by target scholarly databases.
